evals.prompt: 현재 웹 앱을 탐색해서 E2E 테스트 플랜을 작성해줘
evals.expected_output: planner_setup_page로 브라우저 초기화, browser_snapshot으로 페이지 구조 탐색, 사용자 흐름 매핑, planner_save_plan으로 specs/ 저장
expectations: Uses planner_setup_page to initialize the browser with the target URL
Explores at least 3 different pages or sections using browser_snapshot and browser_click
Identifies and documents happy path and edge case user flows
Each test scenario includes numbered steps, expected outcomes, and success criteria
Test scenarios are grouped under numbered category headings
Saves the plan using planner_save_plan to specs/ directory

evals.prompt: 로그인이 필요한 관리자 페이지의 테스트 플랜을 작성해줘
evals.expected_output: 인증 흐름 포함, 로그인 전제조건, 권한별 시나리오, 비인증 접근 에지케이스
expectations: Uses planner_setup_page to initialize the browser
Explores the login page and attempts authentication flow in the browser
Includes authentication as a prerequisite step in test scenarios
Describes both authorized access and unauthorized/unauthenticated access scenarios
Includes session-related edge cases (expired session, invalid token, or logout)
Saves the plan using planner_save_plan to specs/ directory

evals.prompt: CRUD 기능이 있는 할 일 관리 앱인데, 폼 유효성 검증이랑 빈 상태 처리도 테스트해야 해. 테스트 시나리오 정리해줘
evals.expected_output: CRUD 각 동작별 시나리오, 폼 validation 에지케이스(빈 값/특수문자/최대길이), 빈 리스트 상태 UI 검증, 시나리오 간 독립성 보장
expectations: Uses planner_setup_page to initialize the browser
Covers all four CRUD operations (Create, Read, Update, Delete) as separate test scenarios
Includes form validation edge cases: empty input, special characters, and max length
Includes empty state scenario (what the UI shows when no items exist)
Test scenarios are independent of each other and can run in any order
Each scenario has a seed file reference in the plan
Saves the plan using planner_save_plan to specs/ directory

evals.prompt: SPA인데 클라이언트 사이드 라우팅으로 페이지 전환돼. 네비게이션이랑 뒤로가기 버튼도 테스트해야 하거든. 플랜 만들어줘
evals.expected_output: SPA 라우팅 테스트: 클라이언트 사이드 네비게이션, 브라우저 뒤로/앞으로, 직접 URL 접근, 딥링크
expectations: Uses planner_setup_page to initialize the browser
Explores navigation by clicking links and observing URL changes without full page reload
Includes test scenarios for client-side route transitions
Includes browser back/forward button navigation scenarios
Includes direct URL access (deep linking) scenario to verify the page renders correctly
Saves the plan using planner_save_plan to specs/ directory

evals.prompt: Create a test plan for this web app. Pay special attention to form interactions - there are file uploads, date pickers, and multi-select dropdowns
evals.expected_output: 복잡한 폼 인터랙션 테스트 플랜: 파일 업로드, 날짜 선택기, 멀티셀렉트 드롭다운 각각의 시나리오
expectations: Uses planner_setup_page to initialize the browser
Explores form elements by interacting with them in the browser (click, type, upload)
Includes file upload test scenarios (valid file, invalid type, size limit)
Includes date picker interaction scenarios
Includes multi-select dropdown scenarios (select multiple, deselect, clear all)
Each complex form element has both happy path and error scenarios
Saves the plan using planner_save_plan to specs/ directory

evals.prompt: 반응형 웹앱이라 모바일이랑 데스크톱에서 UI가 좀 달라. 햄버거 메뉴도 있고. 뷰포트별로 테스트 시나리오 나눠서 정리해줘
evals.expected_output: 반응형 테스트 플랜: 모바일/데스크톱 뷰포트별 시나리오, 햄버거 메뉴, 레이아웃 차이점
expectations: Uses planner_setup_page to initialize the browser
Explores the app at different viewport sizes or mentions responsive breakpoints
Includes mobile-specific scenarios (hamburger menu, touch-friendly interactions)
Includes desktop-specific scenarios (hover states, sidebar navigation)
Identifies layout differences between mobile and desktop views
Saves the plan using planner_save_plan to specs/ directory
